description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image and defines a single stage called test. Add a test job in the test stage that first sets the environment variable RUST_BACKTRACE=1, then runs apt-get update and installs protobuf-compiler, libseccomp-dev, llvm-dev, libclang-dev, clang, cmake, gcc, and g++ via apt-get, and finally executes cargo test -- --test-threads=1. The job runs on all branches, has no services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
